method: COMMENT_EVALUATION batch 3 (researcher-approved 2026-06-02). new_flags.description: DIRECTIONAL APPENDIX from M38 A7 (reg 111 mercy). The mercy registry has a full T1-T7 Session-B synthesis — 28 findings, wa_session_b_findings ids 1593-1620 (SYN-INTRA-111-001..007 + SYN-INTER-111-008..028): mercy's irreducibly complex definition (4-element / 4-mode structure), whole-person constitutional architecture, comprehensive faculty activation, asymmetric relational chain (receiving precedes giving; God->human->human), formative/generative arc, structural-hub cross-registry position (guilt pole R073 <-> compassion pole R023), and the vocabulary arc (racham/rechem, kipper/kaphar, hilaskomai, techinah/atar). When M05 (Love/Compassion/Kindness) is analysed, treat as directional appendix (registry-scope, NOT term-and-verse), CHECK it against M05's own findings and remove duplicate material before adopting. Full texts retained on the folded source findings.

fold_bulk.resolution_note: Mercy registry-scope T1-T7 synthesis; consolidated into the M05 directional-appendix pointer (M05-APPENDIX-mercy-T1-T7-synthesis). Folded for M38; full text retained for M05 reconciliation/dedup at its turn.
